enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a lively and carefree attitude, celebrating life and its moments.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Kaththi Sandai, the song reflects the protagonist's energetic spirit and zest for life.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Hip Hop Tamizha.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 30, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Konjam Karuppu Thaan, the vibrant energy of Hip Hop Tamizha shines through, making it a perfect dance number. The song captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the joy of living in the moment. It serves as a celebration of life, encouraging listeners to embrace their carefree spirit. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, this track is bound to evoke feelings of happiness and motivation.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Konjam Karuppu Thaan from Kaththi Sandai is an electrifying anthem that showcases the unique flair of Hip Hop Tamizha. With its infectious beats and catchy lyrics, this song is sure to get you moving. Experience the vibrant energy that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: You need to talk for a little while and for some time.
You need to walk a little distance and go.
In the sky, on the earth, love will be in between.
If love is there, even the stones will have warmth.
I am a bit dark, but I am also fiery.
Will you tie me up and give me love?
I am a bit dark, but I am also fierce.
Will you tie me up and give me love?
Come, come to me, come, my dear, come.
Do you like to go, or do you want to stay?
Will you come closer and stay a little?
Even if it exists, will it be found? Will the water flow?
After time passes, will it remain?
But I will live, and love will fade away in the end.
I am a bit dark, but I am also fiery.
Will you tie me up and give me love?
